        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-connector-drag="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {

        /* Zoomed-out truncation: the chip's max-width caps the scaled chip to

        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-connector-drag="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {

        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-connector-drag="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {

        .interactive-canvas-object[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);

        .interactive-canvas-object[data-drop-target="true"] {

        /* Shared z-plumbing for every def-rendered true-outline SVG silhouette

        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-hand-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object {

        /* W2 — section: tint fill, subtle border (= chip fill), no shadow, no
           button-style chrome; the floating title chip renders in CanvasStage's
           section-header layer. */

          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 8.5px;
          padding: 0;
          box-shadow: none;
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
        }
        /* Drop-target state while a drag hovers this section: keep the section's
           2px outline weight (softer than the generic shape drop glow) with a
           faint primary wash so the capture area reads without shouting. */

          outline: 2px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 16%, transparent);

        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip {

          font-weight: 700;

          color: #000000;
          white-space: nowrap;
          overflow: hidden;
        }
        /* Zoomed-out truncation: the chip's max-width caps the scaled chip to
           its section's inner width; the flex-item inner span turns the
           overflow into an ellipsis instead of a mid-letter clip. */
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip > span {
          min-width: 0;
          overflow: hidden;
          text-overflow: ellipsis;
          white-space: nowrap;
        }

        /*
         * W2 — sticky is the ONLY object type with a shadow (per spec, every

<div class="interactive-canvas-stage" data-canvas-stage="true" style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;width:100%;height:100%;background-image:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 1px, transparent 1px);background-position:0px 0px;background-size:8px 8px;background-color:#F5F5F5;font-family:"Inter", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none"><style>
        .interactive-canvas-stage {
          --interactive-canvas-grid: color-mix(in oklab, var(--border) 52%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-guide: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 42%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-highlight: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object {
          position: absolute;
          display: flex;
          min-width: 0;
          flex-direction: column;
          align-items: flex-start;
          justify-content: center;
          gap: 6px;
          overflow: hidden;
          border: 2px solid var(--border);
          border-radius: 8px;
          padding: 12px 14px;
          text-align: left;
          font: inherit;
          transform-origin: center;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: inherit;
          touch-action: none;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-select-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20width%3D%2220%22%20height%3D%2220%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2018%2018%22%3E%3Cpath%20d%3D%22M3.474%2C2.784L14.897%2C6.958c.481%2C.176%2C.467%2C.861-.021%2C1.018l-5.228%2C1.673-1.673%2C5.228c-.156%2C.488-.842%2C.502-1.018%2C.021L2.784%2C3.474c-.157-.43%2C.26-.847%2C.69-.69Z%22%20fill%3D%22%23111%22%20stroke%3D%22%23fff%22%20stroke-width%3D%221.2%22%20stroke-linejoin%3D%22round%22%2F%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E") 3 3, default;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-connector-drag="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: default;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 3px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 22%, transparent);
        }
        /* Shared z-plumbing for every def-rendered true-outline SVG silhouette
           (polygon shapes, junctions) — infrastructure, not per-shape CSS. */
        .interactive-canvas-true-outline-silhouette {
          z-index: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-hand-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object {
          cursor: inherit;
        }
      
        /* W2 — section: tint fill, subtle border (= chip fill), no shadow, no
           button-style chrome; the floating title chip renders in CanvasStage's
           section-header layer. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section {
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 8.5px;
          padding: 0;
          box-shadow: none;
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
        }
        /* Drop-target state while a drag hovers this section: keep the section's
           2px outline weight (softer than the generic shape drop glow) with a
           faint primary wash so the capture area reads without shouting. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 2px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 16%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip {
          position: absolute;
          left: 3px;
          top: 3px;
          height: 27px;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 6px;
          padding: 0 10px;
          font-size: 16px;
          font-weight: 700;
          transform-origin: top left;
          color: #000000;
          white-space: nowrap;
          overflow: hidden;
        }
        /* Zoomed-out truncation: the chip's max-width caps the scaled chip to
           its section's inner width; the flex-item inner span turns the
           overflow into an ellipsis instead of a mid-letter clip. */
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip > span {
          min-width: 0;
          overflow: hidden;
          text-overflow: ellipsis;
          white-space: nowrap;
        }

        /*
         * W2 — sticky is the ONLY object type with a shadow (per spec, every
         * other shape is flat/shadowless). Square corners (STICKY_GEOMETRY.
         * cornerRadiusPx = 0) and the measured down-biased shadow live here;
         * body typography comes from the inset-body text slot.
         */
        .interactive-canvas-object-note {
          justify-content: flex-start;
          border-radius: 0px;
          box-shadow: 0 3px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object-note[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow:
            0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent),
            0 3px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line {
          display: block;
        }
        /*
         * D14 line layout is keyed by the shared renderer/editor attrs.
         * Visual padding clamps at depth 5; bullet glyphs bucket depth 2+
         * together. Center markers in a 1em gutter so glyph side bearings do
         * not shift gaps.
         */
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="0"] {
          padding-left: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="1"] {
          padding-left: 1em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="2"] {
          padding-left: 2em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="3"] {
          padding-left: 3em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="4"] {
          padding-left: 4em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="5"] {
          padding-left: 5em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"] {
          position: relative;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"]::before {
          position: absolute;
          width: 1em;
          text-align: center;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="0"] {
          padding-left: 1em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="0"]::before {
          left: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="1"] {
          padding-left: 2em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="1"]::before {
          left: 1em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="2"] {
          padding-left: 3em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="2"]::before {
          left: 2em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="3"] {
          padding-left: 4em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="3"]::before {
          left: 3em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="4"] {
          padding-left: 5em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="4"]::before {
          left: 4em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="5"] {
          padding-left: 6em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="5"]::before {
          left: 5em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet-glyph="1"]::before {
          content: "•";
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet-glyph="2"]::before {
          content: "◦";
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet-glyph="3"]::before {
          content: "▪";
        }

        /* W2 — code-block: Dracula theme, mono font, right-aligned line-number gutter. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-code-block {
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
          background: #282A36 !important;
          border: none;
          border-radius: 10px;
          padding: 25px 16px 16px 0;
          box-shadow: none;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-code-block-body {
          display: flex;
          flex-direction: column;
          width: 100%;
          overflow: hidden;
          font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
          font-size: 13px;

          color: #F8F8F2;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-code-block-line {

        .interactive-canvas-code-block-line-number {
          flex: 0 0 auto;

          text-align: right;
          color: #999999;

        }
        .interactive-canvas-code-block-line-code {
          flex: 1 1 auto;

        }

        .interactive-canvas-object-ellipse {
          border: none;
          border-radius: 0;
          background: transparent !important;

        .interactive-canvas-stage {

          --interactive-canvas-highlight: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object {
          position: absolute;
          display: flex;
          min-width: 0;
          flex-direction: column;
          align-items: flex-start;
          justify-content: center;
          gap: 6px;
          overflow: hidden;
          border: 2px solid var(--border);
          border-radius: 8px;
          padding: 12px 14px;
          text-align: left;
          font: inherit;
          transform-origin: center;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {

        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-select-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {

        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-connector-drag="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: default;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 3px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 22%, transparent);
        }
        /* Shared z-plumbing for every def-rendered true-outline SVG silhouette

        .interactive-canvas-true-outline-silhouette {

        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-hand-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object {
          cursor: inherit;
        }
      
        /* W2 — section: tint fill, subtle border (= chip fill), no shadow, no
           button-style chrome; the floating title chip renders in CanvasStage's
           section-header layer. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section {
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 8.5px;
          padding: 0;
          box-shadow: none;
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
        }
        /* Drop-target state while a drag hovers this section: keep the section's
           2px outline weight (softer than the generic shape drop glow) with a
           faint primary wash so the capture area reads without shouting. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 2px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 16%, transparent);

        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip {

          font-weight: 700;
          transform-origin: top left;
          color: #000000;
          white-space: nowrap;
          overflow: hidden;
        }
        /* Zoomed-out truncation: the chip's max-width caps the scaled chip to

<div class="interactive-canvas-stage" data-canvas-stage="true" style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;width:100%;height:100%;background-image:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 2px, transparent 2px);background-position:0px 0px;background-size:16px 16px;background-color:#F5F5F5;font-family:"Inter", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none"><style>
        .interactive-canvas-stage {
          --interactive-canvas-grid: color-mix(in oklab, var(--border) 52%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-guide: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 42%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-highlight: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object {
          position: absolute;
          display: flex;
          min-width: 0;
          flex-direction: column;
          align-items: flex-start;
          justify-content: center;
          gap: 6px;
          overflow: hidden;
          border: 2px solid var(--border);
          border-radius: 8px;
          padding: 12px 14px;
          text-align: left;
          font: inherit;
          transform-origin: center;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: inherit;
          touch-action: none;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-select-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20width%3D%2220%22%20height%3D%2220%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2018%2018%22%3E%3Cpath%20d%3D%22M3.474%2C2.784L14.897%2C6.958c.481%2C.176%2C.467%2C.861-.021%2C1.018l-5.228%2C1.673-1.673%2C5.228c-.156%2C.488-.842%2C.502-1.018%2C.021L2.784%2C3.474c-.157-.43%2C.26-.847%2C.69-.69Z%22%20fill%3D%22%23111%22%20stroke%3D%22%23fff%22%20stroke-width%3D%221.2%22%20stroke-linejoin%3D%22round%22%2F%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E") 3 3, default;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-connector-drag="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: default;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 3px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 22%, transparent);
        }
        /* Shared z-plumbing for every def-rendered true-outline SVG silhouette
           (polygon shapes, junctions) — infrastructure, not per-shape CSS. */
        .interactive-canvas-true-outline-silhouette {
          z-index: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-hand-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object {
          cursor: inherit;
        }
      
        /* W2 — section: tint fill, subtle border (= chip fill), no shadow, no
           button-style chrome; the floating title chip renders in CanvasStage's
           section-header layer. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section {
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 8.5px;
          padding: 0;
          box-shadow: none;
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
        }
        /* Drop-target state while a drag hovers this section: keep the section's
           2px outline weight (softer than the generic shape drop glow) with a
           faint primary wash so the capture area reads without shouting. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 2px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 16%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip {
          position: absolute;
          left: 3px;
          top: 3px;
          height: 27px;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 6px;
          padding: 0 10px;
          font-size: 16px;
          font-weight: 700;
          transform-origin: top left;
          color: #000000;
          white-space: nowrap;
          overflow: hidden;
        }
        /* Zoomed-out truncation: the chip's max-width caps the scaled chip to
           its section's inner width; the flex-item inner span turns the
           overflow into an ellipsis instead of a mid-letter clip. */
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip > span {
          min-width: 0;
          overflow: hidden;
          text-overflow: ellipsis;
          white-space: nowrap;
        }

        /*
         * W2 — sticky is the ONLY object type with a shadow (per spec, every
         * other shape is flat/shadowless). Square corners (STICKY_GEOMETRY.
         * cornerRadiusPx = 0) and the measured down-biased shadow live here;
         * body typography comes from the inset-body text slot.
         */
        .interactive-canvas-object-note {
          justify-content: flex-start;
          border-radius: 0px;
          box-shadow: 0 3px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object-note[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow:
            0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent),
            0 3px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line {
          display: block;
        }
        /*
         * D14 line layout is keyed by the shared renderer/editor attrs.
         * Visual padding clamps at depth 5; bullet glyphs bucket depth 2+
         * together. Center markers in a 1em gutter so glyph side bearings do
         * not shift gaps.
         */
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="0"] {
          padding-left: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="1"] {
          padding-left: 1em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="2"] {
          padding-left: 2em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="3"] {
          padding-left: 3em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="4"] {
          padding-left: 4em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="5"] {
          padding-left: 5em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"] {
          position: relative;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"]::before {
          position: absolute;
          width: 1em;
          text-align: center;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="0"] {
          padding-left: 1em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="0"]::before {
          left: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="1"] {
          padding-left: 2em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="1"]::before {
          left: 1em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="2"] {
          padding-left: 3em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="2"]::before {
          left: 2em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="3"] {
          padding-left: 4em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="3"]::before {
          left: 3em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="4"] {
          padding-left: 5em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="4"]::before {
          left: 4em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="5"] {
          padding-left: 6em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="5"]::before {
          left: 5em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet-glyph="1"]::before {
          content: "•";
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet-glyph="2"]::before {
          content: "◦";
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet-glyph="3"]::before {
          content: "▪";
        }

        /* W2 — code-block: Dracula theme, mono font, right-aligned line-number gutter. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-code-block {
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
          background: #282A36 !important;
          border: none;
          border-radius: 10px;
          padding: 25px 16px 16px 0;
          box-shadow: none;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-code-block-body {
          display: flex;
          flex-direction: column;
          width: 100%;
          overflow: hidden;
          font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
          font-size: 13px;
          line-height: 1.5;
          color: #F8F8F2;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-code-block-line {
          display: flex;
          gap: 31px;
          white-space: pre;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-code-block-line-number {
          flex: 0 0 auto;
          width: 35px;
          text-align: right;
          color: #999999;
          user-select: none;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-code-block-line-code {
          flex: 1 1 auto;
          min-width: 0;
        }

        .interactive-canvas-object-ellipse {
          border: none;
          border-radius: 0;
          background: transparent !important;
          box-shadow: none;
          overflow: visible;
        }

        .interactive-canvas-object-diamond {
          clip-path: polygon(50% 0, 100% 50%, 50% 100%, 0 50%);
        }

        .interactive-canvas-object-marker {
          border-radius: 999px;
          padding: 0;
        }

        .interactive-canvas-object-document {
          border: none;
          border-radius: 0;
          background: transparent !important;
          box-shadow: none;
          overflow: visible;
        }

        .interactive-canvas-object-database {
          /* The inline SVG silhouette paints the fill/border; the button
             chrome stays fully transparent so only one outline is visible. */
          border: none;

<div class="interactive-canvas-stage" data-canvas-stage="true" style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;width:100%;height:100%;background-image:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 1px, transparent 1px);background-position:0px 0px;background-size:8px 8px;background-color:#F5F5F5;font-family:"Inter", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none"><style>
        .interactive-canvas-stage {
          --interactive-canvas-grid: color-mix(in oklab, var(--border) 52%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-guide: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 42%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-highlight: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object {
          position: absolute;
          display: flex;
          min-width: 0;
          flex-direction: column;
          align-items: flex-start;
          justify-content: center;
          gap: 6px;
          overflow: hidden;
          border: 2px solid var(--border);
          border-radius: 8px;
          padding: 12px 14px;
          text-align: left;
          font: inherit;
          transform-origin: center;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: inherit;
          touch-action: none;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-select-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20width%3D%2220%22%20height%3D%2220%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2018%2018%22%3E%3Cpath%20d%3D%22M3.474%2C2.784L14.897%2C6.958c.481%2C.176%2C.467%2C.861-.021%2C1.018l-5.228%2C1.673-1.673%2C5.228c-.156%2C.488-.842%2C.502-1.018%2C.021L2.784%2C3.474c-.157-.43%2C.26-.847%2C.69-.69Z%22%20fill%3D%22%23111%22%20stroke%3D%22%23fff%22%20stroke-width%3D%221.2%22%20stroke-linejoin%3D%22round%22%2F%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E") 3 3, default;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-connector-drag="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: default;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 3px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 22%, transparent);
        }
        /* Shared z-plumbing for every def-rendered true-outline SVG silhouette
           (polygon shapes, junctions) — infrastructure, not per-shape CSS. */
        .interactive-canvas-true-outline-silhouette {
          z-index: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-hand-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object {
          cursor: inherit;
        }
      
        /* W2 — section: tint fill, subtle border (= chip fill), no shadow, no
           button-style chrome; the floating title chip renders in CanvasStage's
           section-header layer. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section {
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 8.5px;
          padding: 0;
          box-shadow: none;
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
        }
        /* Drop-target state while a drag hovers this section: keep the section's
           2px outline weight (softer than the generic shape drop glow) with a
           faint primary wash so the capture area reads without shouting. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 2px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 16%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip {
          position: absolute;
          left: 3px;
          top: 3px;
          height: 27px;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 6px;
          padding: 0 10px;
          font-size: 16px;
          font-weight: 700;
          transform-origin: top left;
          color: #000000;
          white-space: nowrap;
          overflow: hidden;
        }
        /* Zoomed-out truncation: the chip's max-width caps the scaled chip to
           its section's inner width; the flex-item inner span turns the
           overflow into an ellipsis instead of a mid-letter clip. */
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip > span {
          min-width: 0;
          overflow: hidden;
          text-overflow: ellipsis;
          white-space: nowrap;
        }

        /*
         * W2 — sticky is the ONLY object type with a shadow (per spec, every
         * other shape is flat/shadowless). Square corners (STICKY_GEOMETRY.
         * cornerRadiusPx = 0) and the measured down-biased shadow live here;
         * body typography comes from the inset-body text slot.
         */
        .interactive-canvas-object-note {
          justify-content: flex-start;
          border-radius: 0px;
          box-shadow: 0 3px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object-note[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow:
            0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent),

        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line {
          display: block;
        }
        /*
         * D14 line layout is keyed by the shared renderer/editor attrs.
         * Visual padding clamps at depth 5; bullet glyphs bucket depth 2+
         * together. Center markers in a 1em gutter so glyph side bearings do
         * not shift gaps.
         */
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="0"] {
          padding-left: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="1"] {
          padding-left: 1em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="2"] {

        }

        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"] {
          position: relative;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"]::before {

        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="0"] {
          padding-left: 1em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="0"]::before {
          left: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="1"] {
          padding-left: 2em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="1"]::before {
          left: 1em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="2"] {
          padding-left: 3em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="2"]::before {
          left: 2em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="3"] {
          padding-left: 4em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="3"]::before {
          left: 3em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="4"] {
          padding-left: 5em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="4"]::before {
          left: 4em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="5"] {
          padding-left: 6em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="5"]::before {
          left: 5em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet-glyph="1"]::before {
          content: "•";
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet-glyph="2"]::before {
          content: "◦";
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet-glyph="3"]::before {
          content: "▪";
        }

        /* W2 — code-block: Dracula theme, mono font, right-aligned line-number gutter. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-code-block {
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
          background: #282A36 !important;
          border: none;
          border-radius: 10px;
          padding: 25px 16px 16px 0;
          box-shadow: none;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-code-block-body {
          display: flex;
          flex-direction: column;
          width: 100%;
          overflow: hidden;
          font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
          font-size: 13px;
          line-height: 1.5;
          color: #F8F8F2;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-code-block-line {

        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-connector-drag="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {

        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-changed="true"] {

        .interactive-canvas-object[data-drop-target="true"] {

        /* W2 — section: tint fill, subtle border (= chip fill), no shadow, no

fixture:v2-flow-elements.viewer:
<div class="interactive-canvas-stage" data-canvas-stage="true" style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;width:100%;height:100%;background-image:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 1px, transparent 1px);background-position:0px 0px;background-size:8px 8px;background-color:#F5F5F5;font-family:"Inter", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none"><style>
        .interactive-canvas-stage {
          --interactive-canvas-grid: color-mix(in oklab, var(--border) 52%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-guide: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 42%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-highlight: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object {
          position: absolute;
          display: flex;
          min-width: 0;
          flex-direction: column;
          align-items: flex-start;
          justify-content: center;
          gap: 6px;
          overflow: hidden;
          border: 2px solid var(--border);
          border-radius: 8px;
          padding: 12px 14px;
          text-align: left;
          font: inherit;
          transform-origin: center;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: inherit;
          touch-action: none;
        }

        .interactive-canvas-object[data-drop-target="true"] {

          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 22%, transparent);
        }
        /* Shared z-plumbing for every def-rendered true-outline SVG silhouette

        .interactive-canvas-true-outline-silhouette {
          z-index: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-hand-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object {
          cursor: inherit;
        }
      
        /* W2 — section: tint fill, subtle border (= chip fill), no shadow, no
           button-style chrome; the floating title chip renders in CanvasStage's
           section-header layer. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section {
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 8.5px;
          padding: 0;
          box-shadow: none;
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
        }
        /* Drop-target state while a drag hovers this section: keep the section's
           2px outline weight (softer than the generic shape drop glow) with a
           faint primary wash so the capture area reads without shouting. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 2px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 16%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip {
          position: absolute;
          left: 3px;
          top: 3px;
          height: 27px;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 6px;
          padding: 0 10px;
          font-size: 16px;
          font-weight: 700;
          transform-origin: top left;
          color: #000000;
          white-space: nowrap;
          overflow: hidden;
        }
        /* Zoomed-out truncation: the chip's max-width caps the scaled chip to
           its section's inner width; the flex-item inner span turns the
           overflow into an ellipsis instead of a mid-letter clip. */
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip > span {
          min-width: 0;
          overflow: hidden;
          text-overflow: ellipsis;
          white-space: nowrap;
        }

        /*
         * W2 — sticky is the ONLY object type with a shadow (per spec, every
         * other shape is flat/shadowless). Square corners (STICKY_GEOMETRY.

         * body typography comes from the inset-body text slot.

        .interactive-canvas-object-note {

        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="2"] {

        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="2"]::before {

        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="3"] {

        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="3"]::before {

        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="4"] {

<div class="interactive-canvas-stage" data-canvas-stage="true" data-canvas-select-tool="true" style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;width:100%;height:100%;background-image:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 0.8px, transparent 0.8px);background-position:-10px 32px;background-size:12.8px 12.8px;background-color:#F5F5F5;font-family:"Inter", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none;cursor:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20width%3D%2220%22%20height%3D%2220%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2018%2018%22%3E%3Cpath%20d%3D%22M3.474%2C2.784L14.897%2C6.958c.481%2C.176%2C.467%2C.861-.021%2C1.018l-5.228%2C1.673-1.673%2C5.228c-.156%2C.488-.842%2C.502-1.018%2C.021L2.784%2C3.474c-.157-.43%2C.26-.847%2C.69-.69Z%22%20fill%3D%22%23111%22%20stroke%3D%22%23fff%22%20stroke-width%3D%221.2%22%20stroke-linejoin%3D%22round%22%2F%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E") 3 3, default"><style>
        .interactive-canvas-stage {
          --interactive-canvas-grid: color-mix(in oklab, var(--border) 52%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-guide: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 42%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-highlight: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object {
          position: absolute;
          display: flex;
          min-width: 0;
          flex-direction: column;
          align-items: flex-start;
          justify-content: center;
          gap: 6px;
          overflow: hidden;
          border: 2px solid var(--border);
          border-radius: 8px;
          padding: 12px 14px;
          text-align: left;
          font: inherit;
          transform-origin: center;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: inherit;
          touch-action: none;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-select-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20width%3D%2220%22%20height%3D%2220%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2018%2018%22%3E%3Cpath%20d%3D%22M3.474%2C2.784L14.897%2C6.958c.481%2C.176%2C.467%2C.861-.021%2C1.018l-5.228%2C1.673-1.673%2C5.228c-.156%2C.488-.842%2C.502-1.018%2C.021L2.784%2C3.474c-.157-.43%2C.26-.847%2C.69-.69Z%22%20fill%3D%22%23111%22%20stroke%3D%22%23fff%22%20stroke-width%3D%221.2%22%20stroke-linejoin%3D%22round%22%2F%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E") 3 3, default;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-connector-drag="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: default;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 3px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 22%, transparent);
        }
        /* Shared z-plumbing for every def-rendered true-outline SVG silhouette
           (polygon shapes, junctions) — infrastructure, not per-shape CSS. */
        .interactive-canvas-true-outline-silhouette {
          z-index: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-hand-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object {
          cursor: inherit;
        }
      
        /* W2 — section: tint fill, subtle border (= chip fill), no shadow, no
           button-style chrome; the floating title chip renders in CanvasStage's
           section-header layer. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section {
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 8.5px;
          padding: 0;
          box-shadow: none;
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
        }
        /* Drop-target state while a drag hovers this section: keep the section's
           2px outline weight (softer than the generic shape drop glow) with a
           faint primary wash so the capture area reads without shouting. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 2px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 16%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip {
          position: absolute;
          left: 3px;
          top: 3px;
          height: 27px;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 6px;
          padding: 0 10px;
          font-size: 16px;
          font-weight: 700;
          transform-origin: top left;
          color: #000000;
          white-space: nowrap;
          overflow: hidden;
        }
        /* Zoomed-out truncation: the chip's max-width caps the scaled chip to
           its section's inner width; the flex-item inner span turns the
           overflow into an ellipsis instead of a mid-letter clip. */
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip > span {
          min-width: 0;
          overflow: hidden;
          text-overflow: ellipsis;
          white-space: nowrap;
        }

        /*
         * W2 — sticky is the ONLY object type with a shadow (per spec, every
         * other shape is flat/shadowless). Square corners (STICKY_GEOMETRY.
         * cornerRadiusPx = 0) and the measured down-biased shadow live here;
         * body typography comes from the inset-body text slot.
         */
        .interactive-canvas-object-note {
          justify-content: flex-start;
          border-radius: 0px;
          box-shadow: 0 3px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object-note[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow:
            0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent),
            0 3px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line {
          display: block;
        }
        /*
         * D14 line layout is keyed by the shared renderer/editor attrs.
         * Visual padding clamps at depth 5; bullet glyphs bucket depth 2+
         * together. Center markers in a 1em gutter so glyph side bearings do
         * not shift gaps.
         */
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="0"] {

<div class="interactive-canvas-stage" data-canvas-stage="true" style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;width:100%;height:100%;background-image:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 2px, transparent 2px);background-position:0px 0px;background-size:16px 16px;background-color:#F5F5F5;font-family:"Inter", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none"><style>
        .interactive-canvas-stage {
          --interactive-canvas-grid: color-mix(in oklab, var(--border) 52%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-guide: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 42%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-highlight: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object {
          position: absolute;
          display: flex;
          min-width: 0;
          flex-direction: column;
          align-items: flex-start;
          justify-content: center;
          gap: 6px;
          overflow: hidden;
          border: 2px solid var(--border);
          border-radius: 8px;
          padding: 12px 14px;
          text-align: left;
          font: inherit;
          transform-origin: center;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: inherit;
          touch-action: none;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-select-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20width%3D%2220%22%20height%3D%2220%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2018%2018%22%3E%3Cpath%20d%3D%22M3.474%2C2.784L14.897%2C6.958c.481%2C.176%2C.467%2C.861-.021%2C1.018l-5.228%2C1.673-1.673%2C5.228c-.156%2C.488-.842%2C.502-1.018%2C.021L2.784%2C3.474c-.157-.43%2C.26-.847%2C.69-.69Z%22%20fill%3D%22%23111%22%20stroke%3D%22%23fff%22%20stroke-width%3D%221.2%22%20stroke-linejoin%3D%22round%22%2F%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E") 3 3, default;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-connector-drag="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: default;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 3px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 22%, transparent);
        }
        /* Shared z-plumbing for every def-rendered true-outline SVG silhouette
           (polygon shapes, junctions) — infrastructure, not per-shape CSS. */
        .interactive-canvas-true-outline-silhouette {
          z-index: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-hand-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object {
          cursor: inherit;
        }
      
        /* W2 — section: tint fill, subtle border (= chip fill), no shadow, no
           button-style chrome; the floating title chip renders in CanvasStage's
           section-header layer. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section {
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 8.5px;
          padding: 0;
          box-shadow: none;
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
        }
        /* Drop-target state while a drag hovers this section: keep the section's
           2px outline weight (softer than the generic shape drop glow) with a
           faint primary wash so the capture area reads without shouting. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 2px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 16%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip {
          position: absolute;
          left: 3px;
          top: 3px;
          height: 27px;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 6px;
          padding: 0 10px;
          font-size: 16px;
          font-weight: 700;
          transform-origin: top left;
          color: #000000;
          white-space: nowrap;
          overflow: hidden;
        }
        /* Zoomed-out truncation: the chip's max-width caps the scaled chip to
           its section's inner width; the flex-item inner span turns the
           overflow into an ellipsis instead of a mid-letter clip. */
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip > span {
          min-width: 0;
          overflow: hidden;
          text-overflow: ellipsis;
          white-space: nowrap;
        }

        /*
         * W2 — sticky is the ONLY object type with a shadow (per spec, every
         * other shape is flat/shadowless). Square corners (STICKY_GEOMETRY.
         * cornerRadiusPx = 0) and the measured down-biased shadow live here;
         * body typography comes from the inset-body text slot.
         */
        .interactive-canvas-object-note {
          justify-content: flex-start;
          border-radius: 0px;
          box-shadow: 0 3px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object-note[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow:
            0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent),
            0 3px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line {
          display: block;

<div class="interactive-canvas-stage" data-canvas-stage="true" style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;width:100%;height:100%;background-image:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 1px, transparent 1px);background-position:0px 0px;background-size:8px 8px;background-color:#F5F5F5;font-family:"Inter", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none"><style>
        .interactive-canvas-stage {
          --interactive-canvas-grid: color-mix(in oklab, var(--border) 52%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-guide: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 42%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-highlight: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object {
          position: absolute;
          display: flex;
          min-width: 0;
          flex-direction: column;
          align-items: flex-start;
          justify-content: center;
          gap: 6px;
          overflow: hidden;
          border: 2px solid var(--border);
          border-radius: 8px;
          padding: 12px 14px;
          text-align: left;
          font: inherit;
          transform-origin: center;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: inherit;
          touch-action: none;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-select-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20width%3D%2220%22%20height%3D%2220%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2018%2018%22%3E%3Cpath%20d%3D%22M3.474%2C2.784L14.897%2C6.958c.481%2C.176%2C.467%2C.861-.021%2C1.018l-5.228%2C1.673-1.673%2C5.228c-.156%2C.488-.842%2C.502-1.018%2C.021L2.784%2C3.474c-.157-.43%2C.26-.847%2C.69-.69Z%22%20fill%3D%22%23111%22%20stroke%3D%22%23fff%22%20stroke-width%3D%221.2%22%20stroke-linejoin%3D%22round%22%2F%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E") 3 3, default;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-connector-drag="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: default;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 3px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 22%, transparent);
        }
        /* Shared z-plumbing for every def-rendered true-outline SVG silhouette
           (polygon shapes, junctions) — infrastructure, not per-shape CSS. */
        .interactive-canvas-true-outline-silhouette {
          z-index: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-hand-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object {
          cursor: inherit;
        }
      
        /* W2 — section: tint fill, subtle border (= chip fill), no shadow, no
           button-style chrome; the floating title chip renders in CanvasStage's
           section-header layer. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section {
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 8.5px;
          padding: 0;
          box-shadow: none;
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
        }
        /* Drop-target state while a drag hovers this section: keep the section's
           2px outline weight (softer than the generic shape drop glow) with a
           faint primary wash so the capture area reads without shouting. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 2px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 16%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip {
          position: absolute;
          left: 3px;
          top: 3px;
          height: 27px;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 6px;
          padding: 0 10px;
          font-size: 16px;
          font-weight: 700;
          transform-origin: top left;
          color: #000000;
          white-space: nowrap;
          overflow: hidden;
        }
        /* Zoomed-out truncation: the chip's max-width caps the scaled chip to
           its section's inner width; the flex-item inner span turns the
           overflow into an ellipsis instead of a mid-letter clip. */
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip > span {
          min-width: 0;
          overflow: hidden;
          text-overflow: ellipsis;
          white-space: nowrap;
        }

        /*
         * W2 — sticky is the ONLY object type with a shadow (per spec, every
         * other shape is flat/shadowless). Square corners (STICKY_GEOMETRY.
         * cornerRadiusPx = 0) and the measured down-biased shadow live here;
         * body typography comes from the inset-body text slot.
         */
        .interactive-canvas-object-note {
          justify-content: flex-start;
          border-radius: 0px;
          box-shadow: 0 3px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object-note[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow:
            0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent),
            0 3px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line {
          display: block;
        }
        /*
         * D14 line layout is keyed by the shared renderer/editor attrs.
         * Visual padding clamps at depth 5; bullet glyphs bucket depth 2+
         * together. Center markers in a 1em gutter so glyph side bearings do
         * not shift gaps.
         */
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="0"] {
          padding-left: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="1"] {
          padding-left: 1em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="2"] {
          padding-left: 2em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="3"] {
          padding-left: 3em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="4"] {
          padding-left: 4em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="5"] {
          padding-left: 5em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"] {
          position: relative;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"]::before {
          position: absolute;
          width: 1em;
          text-align: center;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="0"] {
          padding-left: 1em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="0"]::before {
          left: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="1"] {
          padding-left: 2em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="1"]::before {
          left: 1em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="2"] {
          padding-left: 3em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="2"]::before {
          left: 2em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="3"] {
          padding-left: 4em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="3"]::before {
          left: 3em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="4"] {
          padding-left: 5em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="4"]::before {
          left: 4em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="5"] {
          padding-left: 6em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="5"]::before {
          left: 5em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet-glyph="1"]::before {
          content: "•";
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet-glyph="2"]::before {
          content: "◦";
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet-glyph="3"]::before {
          content: "▪";
        }

        /* W2 — code-block: Dracula theme, mono font, right-aligned line-number gutter. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-code-block {
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
          background: #282A36 !important;
          border: none;
          border-radius: 10px;
          padding: 25px 16px 16px 0;
          box-shadow: none;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-code-block-body {
          display: flex;
          flex-direction: column;
          width: 100%;
          overflow: hidden;
          font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
          font-size: 13px;
          line-height: 1.5;
          color: #F8F8F2;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-code-block-line {
          display: flex;
          gap: 31px;
          white-space: pre;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-code-block-line-number {
          flex: 0 0 auto;
          width: 35px;
          text-align: right;
          color: #999999;
          user-select: none;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-code-block-line-code {
          flex: 1 1 auto;
          min-width: 0;
        }

        .interactive-canvas-object-ellipse {
          border: none;
          border-radius: 0;
          background: transparent !important;
          box-shadow: none;
          overflow: visible;
        }

        .interactive-canvas-object-diamond {
          clip-path: polygon(50% 0, 100% 50%, 50% 100%, 0 50%);
        }

        .interactive-canvas-object-marker {
          border-radius: 999px;
          padding: 0;
        }

        .interactive-canvas-object-document {
          border: none;
          border-radius: 0;
          background: transparent !important;
          box-shadow: none;
          overflow: visible;
        }

        .interactive-canvas-object-database {
          /* The inline SVG silhouette paints the fill/border; the button
             chrome stays fully transparent so only one outline is visible. */
          border: none;
          border-radius: 0;
          background: transparent !important;
          box-shadow: none;
        }

        /* W2 — pill: true stadium shape, radius = height/2 (computed inline via CSS calc). */
        .interactive-canvas-object-pill {
          border-radius: 999px;
        }

        /* W2/W4 — arrow-shape: the SVG silhouette (interactive-canvas-arrow-
           shape-silhouette) paints the full 7-point chevron (fill + stroke),

<div class="interactive-canvas-stage" data-canvas-stage="true" data-canvas-select-tool="true" style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;width:100%;height:100%;background-image:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 0.8px, transparent 0.8px);background-position:-10px 32px;background-size:12.8px 12.8px;background-color:#F5F5F5;font-family:"Inter", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none;cursor:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20width%3D%2220%22%20height%3D%2220%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2018%2018%22%3E%3Cpath%20d%3D%22M3.474%2C2.784L14.897%2C6.958c.481%2C.176%2C.467%2C.861-.021%2C1.018l-5.228%2C1.673-1.673%2C5.228c-.156%2C.488-.842%2C.502-1.018%2C.021L2.784%2C3.474c-.157-.43%2C.26-.847%2C.69-.69Z%22%20fill%3D%22%23111%22%20stroke%3D%22%23fff%22%20stroke-width%3D%221.2%22%20stroke-linejoin%3D%22round%22%2F%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E") 3 3, default"><style>
        .interactive-canvas-stage {
          --interactive-canvas-grid: color-mix(in oklab, var(--border) 52%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-guide: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 42%, transparent);
          --interactive-canvas-highlight: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object {
          position: absolute;
          display: flex;
          min-width: 0;
          flex-direction: column;
          align-items: flex-start;
          justify-content: center;
          gap: 6px;
          overflow: hidden;
          border: 2px solid var(--border);
          border-radius: 8px;
          padding: 12px 14px;
          text-align: left;
          font: inherit;
          transform-origin: center;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: inherit;
          touch-action: none;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-select-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20width%3D%2220%22%20height%3D%2220%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2018%2018%22%3E%3Cpath%20d%3D%22M3.474%2C2.784L14.897%2C6.958c.481%2C.176%2C.467%2C.861-.021%2C1.018l-5.228%2C1.673-1.673%2C5.228c-.156%2C.488-.842%2C.502-1.018%2C.021L2.784%2C3.474c-.157-.43%2C.26-.847%2C.69-.69Z%22%20fill%3D%22%23111%22%20stroke%3D%22%23fff%22%20stroke-width%3D%221.2%22%20stroke-linejoin%3D%22round%22%2F%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E") 3 3, default;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-connector-drag="true"] .interactive-canvas-object[data-editable="true"] {
          cursor: default;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 3px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 22%, transparent);
        }
        /* Shared z-plumbing for every def-rendered true-outline SVG silhouette
           (polygon shapes, junctions) — infrastructure, not per-shape CSS. */
        .interactive-canvas-true-outline-silhouette {
          z-index: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-stage[data-canvas-hand-tool="true"] .interactive-canvas-object {
          cursor: inherit;
        }
      
        /* W2 — section: tint fill, subtle border (= chip fill), no shadow, no
           button-style chrome; the floating title chip renders in CanvasStage's
           section-header layer. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section {
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 8.5px;
          padding: 0;
          box-shadow: none;
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
        }
        /* Drop-target state while a drag hovers this section: keep the section's
           2px outline weight (softer than the generic shape drop glow) with a
           faint primary wash so the capture area reads without shouting. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-section[data-drop-target="true"] {
          outline: 2px solid var(--primary);
          outline-offset: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 16%, transparent);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip {
          position: absolute;
          left: 3px;
          top: 3px;
          height: 27px;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          border-style: solid;
          border-width: 2px;
          border-radius: 6px;
          padding: 0 10px;
          font-size: 16px;
          font-weight: 700;
          transform-origin: top left;
          color: #000000;
          white-space: nowrap;
          overflow: hidden;
        }
        /* Zoomed-out truncation: the chip's max-width caps the scaled chip to
           its section's inner width; the flex-item inner span turns the
           overflow into an ellipsis instead of a mid-letter clip. */
        .interactive-canvas-section-title-chip > span {
          min-width: 0;
          overflow: hidden;
          text-overflow: ellipsis;
          white-space: nowrap;
        }

        /*
         * W2 — sticky is the ONLY object type with a shadow (per spec, every
         * other shape is flat/shadowless). Square corners (STICKY_GEOMETRY.
         * cornerRadiusPx = 0) and the measured down-biased shadow live here;
         * body typography comes from the inset-body text slot.
         */
        .interactive-canvas-object-note {
          justify-content: flex-start;
          border-radius: 0px;
          box-shadow: 0 3px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-object-note[data-changed="true"] {
          box-shadow:
            0 0 0 5px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 18%, transparent),
            0 3px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line {
          display: block;
        }
        /*
         * D14 line layout is keyed by the shared renderer/editor attrs.
         * Visual padding clamps at depth 5; bullet glyphs bucket depth 2+
         * together. Center markers in a 1em gutter so glyph side bearings do
         * not shift gaps.
         */
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="0"] {
          padding-left: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="1"] {
          padding-left: 1em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="2"] {
          padding-left: 2em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="3"] {
          padding-left: 3em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="4"] {
          padding-left: 4em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-line-depth="5"] {
          padding-left: 5em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"] {
          position: relative;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"]::before {
          position: absolute;
          width: 1em;
          text-align: center;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="0"] {
          padding-left: 1em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="0"]::before {
          left: 0;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="1"] {
          padding-left: 2em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="1"]::before {
          left: 1em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="2"] {
          padding-left: 3em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="2"]::before {
          left: 2em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="3"] {
          padding-left: 4em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="3"]::before {
          left: 3em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="4"] {
          padding-left: 5em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="4"]::before {
          left: 4em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="5"] {
          padding-left: 6em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet="true"][data-line-depth="5"]::before {
          left: 5em;
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet-glyph="1"]::before {
          content: "•";
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet-glyph="2"]::before {
          content: "◦";
        }
        .interactive-canvas-sticky-line[data-bullet-glyph="3"]::before {
          content: "▪";
        }

        /* W2 — code-block: Dracula theme, mono font, right-aligned line-number gutter. */
        .interactive-canvas-object-code-block {
          align-items: stretch;
          justify-content: flex-start;
          background: #282A36 !important;
          border: none;
          border-radius: 10px;
